ai_keys.description: Use your own Anthropic API key for chat. Your key is encrypted and never stored in plaintext.
ai_keys.key_info: Your API key is encrypted before storage. It's used for chat requests when BYOA is enabled on Pro+ plans.
ai_keys.no_keys_description: Add your own API key to use advanced models.
ai_keys.provider_info: Select the AI provider for your API key. Currently only Anthropic (Claude) is supported.
ai_keys.title: API Keys
app.name: Contentrain Studio
auth.magic_link_sent_description: We sent a login link to
auth.magic_link_sent_instruction: Check your inbox and click the link to sign in.
auth.marketing_signin_desc: Manage your content with conversation-first workflows.
auth.marketing_signup_desc: Set up your project and start managing content in seconds.
auth.or_email: or sign in with your email
auth.sign_in_description: Sign in to manage your content
branch.confirm_reject: Reject this branch? All changes will be discarded.
cdn.builds_info: Each build snapshots your content into the CDN. Builds trigger automatically on content changes.
cdn.description: Deliver content via CDN for mobile, desktop, and non-web apps.
cdn.key_created: API key created — copy it now, it won't be shown again
cdn.keys_description: Keys authenticate CDN requests. Shown only once at creation.
cdn.keys_info: API keys authenticate requests to the CDN. Each key is shown only once at creation — store it securely.
cdn.title: CDN Delivery
chat.empty_description: Type a message to create models, add entries, translate content, or ask questions about your project. The AI agent handles everything through conversation.
chat.init_prompt: Initialize my project — detect the framework and set up content structure.
chat.title: Chat
danger_zone.project_confirm_label: Type the repository name to confirm
danger_zone.project_delete_description: This will permanently remove this project from your workspace. All conversations, CDN builds, media assets, and cached content will be deleted. The Git repository itself will not be affected.
danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.workspace_confirm_label: Type the workspace name to confirm
danger_zone.workspace_delete_description: This will permanently delete this workspace and all its projects, conversations, CDN builds, media assets, and member access. This action cannot be undone.
danger_zone.workspace_primary_warning: Your primary workspace cannot be deleted. It is tied to your account.
content.confirm_delete_model: Delete the {model} model and all its content?
content.no_content_description: Ask the agent to create content for this model, or add entries via chat.
content.no_models_description: Tell the chat agent what content you need — e.g. "Create a blog post model with title, body, and cover image."
content.not_found_description: Click "Initialize project" or describe your content needs in the chat — the agent will detect your framework and create the content structure automatically.
content.slug_hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
content.title: Content
content.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
content.vocabulary_empty_description: Ask the chat agent to add terms — e.g. "Add vocabulary term 'CTA' meaning 'Call to Action'." Terms keep translations consistent across locales.
error.403_description: You don't have permission to access this page.
error.404_description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
error.500_description: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
github.contentrain_missing: .contentrain/ not found — you can initialize via chat after connecting
github.install_description: Connect your GitHub account so Studio can read your repositories and manage content through Git. This is required before creating or connecting projects.
github.install_hint: After installing, close this dialog and reopen it.
github.no_repos_hint: Try adjusting your search or check your GitHub App installation permissions.
github.scan_failed: Failed to scan repository. Please try again.
members.no_members_description: Invite editors, reviewers, and viewers to collaborate on content.
members.project_access_description: Assign workspace members to projects with specific roles.
members.project_access_info: Project members get specific roles (editor, reviewer, viewer) per project. Workspace owners and admins have full access to all projects.
media.empty_description: Drag and drop files here or click to upload. Assets are stored in your project and can be referenced from any content field.
media.pro_required: Upload, organize, and optimize images and files with the Asset Manager. Use assets directly in your content fields.
media.path_description: Enter a media path or external URL
media.title: Assets
project_settings.default_locale_info: The primary language for content. New entries are created in this locale first.
project_settings.domains_info: Content domains organize models into logical groups (e.g. marketing, blog, system).
project_settings.locales_info: All languages this project supports. Content can be translated into each locale.
project_settings.stack_info: The detected framework for this project. Used by the agent for framework-specific suggestions.
project_settings.title: Project Settings
project_settings.workflow_auto_desc: Changes are merged immediately after save.
project_settings.workflow_info: Controls how content changes are applied. Auto-merge commits directly. Review creates branches for team approval.
project_settings.workflow_pro_hint: Upgrade to Pro to enable review workflow with branch-based content approval.
project_settings.workflow_review_desc: Editors create branches. Reviewers approve before merge.
projects.empty_description: Start from a ready-made template or connect an existing GitHub repository. Each project is linked to a repo where your content lives.
projects.title: Projects
settings.github_error_hint: The GitHub App installation could not be reached. It may have been removed or permissions may need to be updated.
settings.github_info: GitHub App installation enables repository access for content management.
settings.github_not_connected_hint: Install the GitHub App to connect repositories.
settings.github_repos_info: These repositories are accessible by the Contentrain GitHub App. Manage access in your GitHub App settings.
settings.github_suspended_hint: Your GitHub App installation has been suspended. Please check your GitHub settings to resolve this.
settings.members_description: Invite members and manage roles. Coming soon.
settings.members_info: Manage who can access this workspace and their permission levels.
settings.plan_info: Your current subscription tier. Determines available features and limits.
settings.slug_info: URL-safe identifier used in workspace URLs. Changing this will update all workspace links.
settings.workspace_name_info: Your workspace name appears in the sidebar and URLs.
sidebar.install_github_hint: Install the GitHub App to get started. This lets Studio read and manage content in your repositories.
starters.created_error: Failed to create project from template
starters.description: Choose a starter template to create a new project with pre-configured content models
starters.invalid_repo_name: Only letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and dots allowed
starters.needs_access: Repository created! Please add it to your GitHub App installation to connect it as a project.
starters.private_repo_hint: Only you and collaborators can see this repository
starters.title: Start from Template
